title: Business Analyst | Contract
description:
Job Scope

  • Conduct thorough requirements analysis to identify areas for improvement in the organization's business processes.
  • Work closely with stakeholders to gather and document requirements.
  • Translate requirements into functional specifications.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and implement solutions that align with the organization's business model strategy.
  • Perform test data prep and execution based on test case scenarios.



Job Requirements

  • Degree in a technical or business discipline or equivalent experience.
  • Minimum of 2 years of business analyst experience.
  • Good verbal and written communication skill and comfortable fronting client.
  • Ability to work effectively in a team.
  • Experience in developing structured user manuals and training; business rules modelling, developing and executing acceptance test plans.
  • Experience in Agile methodology.

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality. If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with carolyn.mendoza@manpower.com.sg | Personnel Reg No.: R1105160 | EA License: 02C3423

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012. To learn more about ManpowerGroup's Global Privacy Policy, please visit https://www.manpower.com.sg/privacy-policy

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
